recipes.title: Nasi Lemak
recipes.ingredients: Rice, Coconut Milk, Pandan, Anchovies, Peanuts, Chili, Egg
recipes.instructions:
1. Cook rice with coconut milk and pandan.
2. Fry anchovies and peanuts.
3. Prepare sambal paste.
4. Serve all together.
recipes.description: Fragrant coconut rice served with spicy sambal, anchovies, peanuts, and boiled egg.

recipes.title: Beef Rendang
recipes.ingredients: Beef, Coconut Milk, Lemongrass, Galangal, Turmeric, Kerisik
recipes.instructions:
1. Blend spices into a paste.
2. Sauté paste and add beef.
3. Add coconut milk and simmer.
4. Cook until liquid is absorbed.
recipes.description: Slow-cooked beef in a rich, spicy coconut milk and spice reduction.

recipes.title: Chicken Satay
recipes.instructions:
1. Marinate chicken.
2. Skewer the meat.
3. Grill until charred.
4. Serve with spicy peanut sauce.
recipes.description: Grilled marinated chicken skewers served with peanut sauce.

recipes.title: Char Kway Teow
recipes.ingredients: Flat Noodles, Prawns, Sausage, Eggs, Beansprouts, Soy Sauce
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat wok with lard.
2. Fry garlic and prawns.
3. Add noodles and sauces.
4. Toss in sprouts and egg.
recipes.description: Wok-fried flat rice noodles with prawns and Chinese sausage.

recipes.title: Laksa Nyonya
recipes.ingredients: Rice Vermicelli, Prawns, Fishcake, Coconut Milk, Laksa Leaves
recipes.instructions:
1. Prepare laksa broth.
2. Add coconut milk.
3. Blanch noodles.
4. Garnish and serve.
recipes.description: Spicy coconut noodle soup with prawns and fishcakes.

recipes.title: Margherita Pizza
recipes.ingredients: Dough, Tomato Sauce, Mozzarella, Basil, Olive Oil
recipes.instructions:
1. Roll dough.
2. Add sauce and cheese.
3. Bake in hot oven.
4. Top with fresh basil.
recipes.description: Classic pizza with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and fresh basil.

recipes.title: Pad Thai
recipes.ingredients: Rice Noodles, Shrimp, Tofu, Tamarind, Peanuts, Lime
recipes.instructions:
1. Soak noodles.
2. Fry tofu/shrimp.
3. Add noodles and sauce.
4. Stir in eggs and peanuts.
recipes.description: Thai stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, and peanuts.

recipes.title: Tom Yum Soup
recipes.ingredients: Prawns, Mushrooms, Lemongrass, Galangal, Chili, Lime
recipes.instructions:
1. Boil water with herbs.
2. Add prawns/mushrooms.
3. Season with fish sauce/lime.
4. Add chili paste.
recipes.description: Spicy and sour Thai soup with prawns and lemongrass.
